understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level (BP35 here) without landing on spike tiles, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt, then continue clearing levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK (or UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), reaches the goal `+`, or hits a hazard. Spikes (`u`/`v`) are lethal if landed on and end the attempt immediately. CLICK targets a specific grid coordinate to interact with clickable tiles, mainly removing breakable blocks (`x`) to open a fall path; clicks do not count as horizontal moves for platform timers. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from a bad move/click. Planning uses the provided left_landing/right_landing previews and corridor_scan to find safe landings and prioritize passage columns that drop to a new y-level/section.
